title: Amtech B1340 250mm (10") Water Pump Pliers with Comfort Grip
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This 250mm (10") water pump plier is made from drop forged carbon steel with a satin finish for durability.
COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: With heavy duty dual colour comfort grips, it has serrated gripping jaws and an easily adjustable slip joint
PRACTICAL SIZE: 200mm length provides reach and stability.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople alike.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Plier See more
